coverage: Every reachable node type across all thirteen distinct Math Clay surface roots has a browser handler.
materialParity: Every one of the thirteen cataloged surfaces now has a durable 768 x 768 authored Eevee reference, WebGL capture, and metric report in material-parity-all.json. The reusable Filament and Cross Section implementation reproduces the extracted Generated-coordinate 3D White Noise plus distorted Z Wave field, Rec.709 color conversion, derivative Bump relief, dynamic Principled roughness and coat fields, the dark-HSV Screen/Window Wave Backfacing branch, and clearcoat Fresnel derived from Blender's authored 1.59000015 coat IOR. The D-surface's separate BDSF graph now reproduces its blue col/rough Principled front and diagonal Backfacing emission branch, reducing macro luminance MAE from 0.0719 to 0.0067 and mean-luminance error from +0.0719 to -0.0026. Across all variants, silhouette IoU spans 0.9920 to 0.9971 and macro luminance MAE spans 0.0067 to 0.0510. Preserving evaluated face-loop winding instead of forcing display shells outward restores Blender's intentional inward Volume to Mesh orientation: TPMS.019 and TPMS.020 improve from near-zero shader correlation to 0.9869 and 0.9795 macro correlation. Twisted Saddle remains exposure-balanced at +0.0005 mean luminance error. Procedural filtering, thin backface occupancy, and cross-renderer dark-surface lighting phase are the leading residuals; renderer identity is not claimed.
validation: All thirteen roots evaluate with Blender's inclusive Volume Cube lattice, minimum-bound transform, sparse OpenVDB boundary guards, fixed ambiguous-cell edge groups, Blender-equivalent directional quad ordering, float32 Stepped Map Range fields, and evaluated face-loop winding preserved through triangle-soup export. Twelve full roots are topology-exact. Native Manifold face provenance reconstructs authored nonplanar polygons after hard-sphere cuts, and polygon-level cleanup removes intersection vertices that lie only on the input fan triangulation: lorenze.007 is exact at 16,249 / 15,459 and TPMS.018 is exact at 14,190 / 13,558, including Blender's complete face-size histograms. TPMS.016's full 74^3 Volume Cube field is value-exact against Blender. Reproducing copyFromDense's uniform 8^3 active-tile pruning and GridTransformer's float BoxSampler advances it to 87,095 / 85,386. Its deterministic 136,062 / 136,060 pre-Boolean mesh is a native OpenVDB 12 outcome: thirty identical native intersection-mask runs varied from 136,062 to 136,076 cells; twenty identical native mesh runs varied from 136,062 / 136,060 through 136,072 / 136,070 and produced the stored 136,066 / 136,064 reference three times. Blender 5.1.2 independently confirms the race: ten identical same-session full evaluations ranged from 87,095 / 85,386 to 87,101 / 85,392, six landed exactly on GN-VM, and a separate cold run produced 87,105 / 85,396. The snapshot differences are therefore OpenVDB's parallel intersection-tree scheduling race, not a field, resampling, or browser topology mismatch.
